title.en: After the Star Lord incident passed, Ye Tian we...

content.en:
After the Star Lord incident passed, Ye Tian went into retreat again.

Of course, his main body is in retreat, and the other replicating bodies still have something to do.

Ye Tian has already controlled time, mastered the way of the sword, and in the case of not being able to control the space, he still needs to control other ways.

Therefore, he is sure to get more legendary-level ancestral endowments.

For example, the next Dao to be controlled, he chose the Thunder Dao, and the reason why he chose a Dao was because he heard that there was a Thunder Ancestral Beast in the Void Region, and there were quite a few such creatures, and all of them had the Legendary Thunder Ancestor Endowment.

Due to the low intelligence of the Thunder Ancestral Beast and its lack of understanding, even if it is highly talented, it is useless, and if it cannot control time and space, it will not be able to become a Legendary Realm Lord.

Therefore, the place of the Thunder Ancestor Beast in the Void Region was not high, and it was even far inferior to the Purple "One Sixty" Aurora Beast.

Although the Purple Aurora Beast was not very intelligent, the first Purple Aurora Beast in the Void Region was very powerful and became the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Therefore, for a long time, the purple-level light beast was blessed by the peak Legendary Realm lord, and its status was much higher than that of the Thunder Ancestral Beast.

And the Thunder Ancestral Beast has no status from beginning to end, and because the Thunder Ancestral Beast is quite domineering and mighty in appearance, many Legendary Lord-level Thunder Ancestral Beasts have been captured by many Legendary Lords as mounts.

It was an honor to ride the Thunder Ancestral Beast in the Void in a certain Eternal Sea.

Due to the legendary lord's aggressive capture of the Thunder Ancestral Beast, the Thunder Ancestral Beast is now almost hidden. 、

However, this is not difficult for Ye Tian.

Soon, Ye Tian found a Thunder Ancestral Beast in the Infinite Sea.

This Thunder Ancestral Beast belonged to a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, but Ye Tian did not disturb that Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, but secretly spied into the past time and space of the Thunder Ancestral Beast.

After a while, Ye Tian locked on to the place where this Thunder Ancestral Beast came from.

"It turned out to be there. "

Ye Tian tore through time casually, entered the long river of time and hurried, and came to a place in the void area in an instant.

This is a minefield, a very remote area, and the Thunder Ancestor Beast is hiding in this minefield.

Normally, no one came here at all, so the Thunder Ancestral Beast had never been discovered.

What's more, the Thunder Ancestral Beast also has the combat power of the top half-step Legendary Realm Lord level, and even if the average Legendary Lord discovers this, he will not dare to enter it.

As for the Legendary Realm Lord, he has no interest in the Thunder Ancestral Beast and will not come here to catch the Thunder Ancestral Beast.

Ye Tian, if he wants to copy the talent of the Thunder Ancestral Beast, he will come here.

Wow.

Ye Tian entered this Thunder Domain, and he had already seen the Thunder Ancestral Beast in the Thunder Domain.

However, he was somewhat disappointed.

The number of Thunder Ancestral Beasts here is a little small, but it won't be in vain.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

The Legendary Thunder Ancestor Fu of the Gate was copied by Ye Tian, and in a short time, all the talents of the Thunder Ancestor Beasts in this Thunder Domain were copied into his hands.

Immediately, Ye Tian left here without attracting the attention of any Thunder Ancestor Beast.

In the following period of time, Ye Tian found several gathering points of Thunder Ancestral Beasts and copied all of their talents.

In this way, Ye Tiancai gathered the legendary Thunder Ancestor Fu.

"Enough should be enough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to fuse these legendary Thunder Ancestor Fu.

Years passed, and a long time passed, Ye Tiancai finally fused these legendary-level thunder ancestor endowments, and let these legendary-level thunder ancestral endowments completely merge into the legendary thunder ancestral endowments.

The legendary Thunder Ancestor Fu was born, and Ye Tian's speed of comprehension of it skyrocketed many times at once.

In the following days, Ye Tian made every effort to use the three thousand iris to begin to comprehend the Thunder Dao, with the combination of the three thousand iris and the legendary Thunder Ancestor, Ye Tian's progress in the Thunder Dao became faster and faster.

Tens of millions of eternal years later.

this day.

Ye Tian's body exuded the aura of the Thunder Dao, this was the aura of completely controlling the Thunder Dao.

At this moment, the Dragon Gu Lord and the Frostless Lord were dumbfounded again.

"Wouldn't it, the Endless Lord has taken control of the Thunder Dao again?"

Lord Baiheng was stimulated.

is also a Legendary Realm Lord, he still broke through first, why is he almost negligible now, but Ye Tian has controlled the Sword Dao and the Thunder Dao successively........

In this comparison, he was completely turned into scum.

Almost all the Legendary Realm Lords were stimulated by Ye Tian, and they worked harder one by one, at least they had to make some progress, otherwise they would really be hit too hard.

As for why Ye Tian controlled the Sword Dao and Thunder Dao so quickly, they didn't think too much about it.

In their opinion, Ye Tian is purely highly talented and highly perceptive, so high that it is unimaginable.

They couldn't think of any other reason than that.

"Don't compare yourself to the Endless Lord, otherwise it will be too exciting!"

The Frostless Lord said secretly.

After mastering the Thunder Dao, Ye Tian began to try to combine the Thunder Dao with time to create a more powerful speed-type supreme technique.

Because, he felt that his time escape was still not strong enough, the last time he fought with the Trick Star Lord, he couldn't even block the Trick Star Lord's Trick Star Arrow, and in the face of the powerful Legendary Realm Lord, the time escape had almost no effect.

Therefore, he also needs an extremely powerful speed supreme skill, preferably suitable for combat.

And Thunder Dao is not only powerful in attack, but also first-class in speed, which can be combined with time.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to create drills.

Eternal epoch after eternity has passed.

This time it took longer than the last time to create the Void River Sword Light, and it took a full 0.9 of Ye Tian's six eternal epochs to finally create an extremely powerful speed-like supreme technique.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian's replica body practiced the newly created supreme technique here, his body shuttled through the long river of time at an unimaginable speed, and thunder light appeared on his body, piercing through the long river of time and shattering all the barriers of time and space.

This is many times faster than before

"Very good, this supreme skill is much stronger than Time Escape, Time Escape is just a ghost, but once it is cracked, it will not have much effect. And this supreme skill is pure speed, and it can't be cracked unless it's faster than me. "

Ye Tian gave this supreme skill a name, it was called Lei Ji Escape!

created the Thunder Pole Escape, and Ye Tian's strength improved a little again. _
